name: Rocket Shaped Kids' Accent Rug - Pillowfort™
description: Add space-themed decor to your kid's space with the Rocket-Shaped Kids' Accent Rug from Pillowfort™. Designed in the shape of a rocket for an out-of-this-world look, this tufted accent rug easily integrates with a variety of color schemes, and the 100% cotton construction offers soft underfoot comfort. Plus, this medium-pile accent rug is machine washable for easy cleaning.
